title: Shogun's Construct
description: This thingpack brings Various katana's for Tinker's Construct, take on your enemies with a plethora of feudal blades.
body:
from the stealthfull tanto to  the mighty odachi, Shoguns-construct brings Various katana's for Tinker's Construct for slicing down the undead, arthrods and pillagers alike, embody bushido and start tinkering!
![Odachi, Tanto and Wakizashi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/599e83f3ecea39e266aaba54c3b481c448466ad1.png)
